news.t: ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'
Here are some ETFs State Street likes with recession worries, Fed rate hikes in focus

holdings.infoBox: QUS is an equity ETF with a total of 528 individual holdings. The top holdings are Microsoft stock at 2.98%, Apple at 2.97%, NVIDIA at 2.64%, Meta Platforms at 2.26%, and Eli Lilly and Company at 2.20%.

overview.description: The State Street SPDR MSCI USA StrategicFactors ETF (QUS) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MSCI USA Factor Mix A-Series Capped index. The fund tracks an index of US large- and mid-cap stocks comprising three equally weighted subindexes with value, quality and minimum volatility factor strategies. QUS was launched on Apr 16, 2015 and is issued by State Street.
infoTable: MSCI USA Factor Mix A-Series Capped

data.title: ETF investors flee cash-like government bond funds, favor riskier assets in ‘bullish buying'
data.text: Hello! In this week's ETF Wrap, you'll get a look at flow data showing recent “bullish buying behavior” from investors, as well as funds to consider before 2024 hits.
